title: Fix CJS/ESM mismatch in dist/cli.js build (node:crypto import in CommonJS bundle…
prompt:
Running 'kanban --host <ip>' crashes at startup with: dist/cli.js:24802 'import { randomBytes, timingSafeEqual } from "node:crypto";' -> error: Cannot use import statement with CommonJS-only features; note: This file is CommonJS because 'module' was used (Bun v1.3.14).

The build (npm run link -> npm run build) succeeds and produces dist/cli.js via scripts/build.mjs (esbuild). But the emitted bundle is CommonJS (references 'module') while still containing a leftover ESM import for node:crypto, which Bun refuses to load.

Task: Investigate scripts/build.mjs esbuild configuration. Ensure a consistent output format/platform (platform: 'node', correct format) so node builtins like node:crypto are emitted as require() rather than a raw ESM import, or otherwise eliminate the mixed CJS/ESM output. Verify that after 'npm run link', running 'kanban --host <ip>' boots cleanly without the import error.
